name: moodboard-capture
description: Capture inspiration assets and build reusable taste-memory profiles in a repo moodboard folder or personal inbox.

interface.shortDescription: Save inspiration and build taste-memory profiles for future AI-assisted design work.
interface.longDescription: Captures a desktop full-page screenshot for a URL or imports a local image, saves it into the best available moodboard folder, and builds per-item taste interpretation plus local and workspace-level taste profiles when analysis is available.
defaultPrompt: Save https://example.com to my moodboard and explain what makes the design work.
Import /Users/me/Desktop/inspiration.png and build taste-memory signals from it.
Capture this website into the moodboard folder with a note about what stands out.
